title: HOME FOOD DELIVERY - 211info
text: MADRAS COMMUNITY FOOD PANTRY HOME FOOD DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Delivers food to homebound individuals unable to visit the food pantry. Delivery is within an 11 mile radius of Madras. 370 SW Culver Highway Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities who are homebound Hours: 3rd Thursday of the month by appointment Email (541) 325-1747 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 325-1747 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information or to schedule a delivery FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Culver, Madras, and Metolius Services: Grocery Ordering/Delivery * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Grocery Ordering/Delivery * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY AND FREE FOOD MARKET If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRAS COMMUNITY FOOD PANTRY
